title: Best Stock to Buy: Lyft vs. Uber vs. DoorDash
text: The three companies are growing rapidly while generating losses on the bottom line.

title: The Top 3 Growth Stocks in the Food Delivery Industry
text: After experiencing a record surge during the pandemic, the food delivery market is continuing its meteoric rise, facilitated by increasing urbanization and growing demand for convenient, contactless services. According to Grand View Research, the global online food delivery services market was valued at $50.7 billion in 2021 and is projected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 18.7% from 2022 to 2030.

title: Aldi partners with DoorDash for home delivery in the US
text: DoorDash, an American food delivery service, has partnered with Aldi to bring instant delivery to US customers. The service will be available to customers who live in one of the 38 states where the supermarket chain operates, with over 2,100 locations.

title: DoorDash Welcomes Sustained Profitability Today
text: With continued innovation and expansion through acquisitions, DoorDash has solidified its presence in both the US and international markets. It has realized record monthly active users and has positive momentum on its retention growth which supports its growing top line.

title: 3 Hot Stocks The Institutions Bought In Q1
text: Albemarle, Crocs and DoorDash are all seeing increased sell-side activity and that is evident in their charts and price action.

title: Uber, Lyft, DoorDash trade group asks for delay of worker-classification rule after Marty Walsh resignation
text: The resignation of Secretary of Labor Marty Walsh this week has prompted the lobbying group that represents Uber Technologies Inc., DoorDash Inc., Lyft Inc. and other gig companies to call for putting off finalizing a proposed Labor Department rule on worker classification.

title: DoorDash (DASH) Reports Q4 Loss, Beats Revenue Estimates
text: DoorDash's (DASH) fourth-quarter 2022 results reflect higher costs despite a significant rise in total orders.

title: DoorDash stock up as investors overlook losses
text: DoorDash Inc (NYSE:DASH) stock is indicated higher ahead of today's open in New York after last night's results which proclaimed the takeout and grocery delivery app's “best quarter ever”. On paper, the company lost some US$642mln in the fourth quarter, including dents from layoffs as well as write-offs related to its acquisition of European firm Wolt.

title: DoorDash stock pops after revenue beats, rosy guidance
text: DoorDash reported better-than-expected sales for the fourth quarter and gave upbeat guidance for the current period.

title: DoorDash stock surges on ‘best quarter ever,' despite holiday losses more than doubling expectations
text: DoorDash Inc. on Thursday reported a much wider fourth-quarter net loss than expected, though the company beat most other Wall Street estimates, including for revenue, orders and its first-quarter forecast.

title: 7 Stocks to Buy as Employees Prepare to Quit En Masse
text: Although gainful employment may seemingly represent a source of gratitude during a season of layoffs, that might not be the case right now, thus cynically bolstering the narrative for specific stocks to buy. According to a late-Jan. 2023 report by Chicago-based staffing firm LaSalle Network, its survey found that 85% of U.S. workers may consider leaving their jobs in the next six months.

title: Is DoorDash set for volatility with share price poised ahead of 4Q results?
text: DoorDash Inc (NYSE:DASH) shares are poised ahead of today's quarterly results, due after market close, with the price holding steady after a wave of buys on Wednesday. The food and groceries delivery firm advanced some 11% a day before the results, and, now with a few hours to go investors await volatility.

title: DoorDash introduces new safety features for riders including reduced notifications
text: Delivery company DoorDash is introducing new features for riders including reduced notifications, a request for customers to not text them while they are on a trip, and messaging promoting one-tap replies. DoorDash is updating its iOS app (for iOS 15 or above) to reduce notifications sent to delivery partners while they are on the way.

title: Uber Eats Prioritizes Unit Economics as DoorDash Focuses on Reach
text: In the race between aggregators, Uber Eats is prioritizing profitability while DoorDash is eyeing geographic growth. The delivery service may not be able to compete with United States category leader DoorDash's geographic reach, but what it does have is the entire cross-vertical Uber user base at its disposal.

title: ROKU Partners With DoorDash to Expand Offerings for Users
text: Roku (ROKU) collaborates with DoorDash, an online food delivery platform, to expand its offerings to viewers, which will get their food delivered at an inexpensive price.

title: 3 Doors Investors Are Finally Starting to Open in 2023
text: DoorDash, Opendoor, and Nextdoor got crushed in 2022, but they've been "door" prizes in 2023.
